title: Tom's Peripherals - Greg Flavoured
body:
# Tom's Peripherals: Greg Flavoured
![A showcase of the retextures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5af6a51fbcfde1302400ab9b4a725be106a9bf48.png)

**Tom's Peripherals: Greg Flavoured** is a resource pack for [CC:Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) that tries to fit the style of [GTCEu Modern](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtechceu-modern) and [GregTech Refreshed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gregtech-refreshed).

This Resource Pack goes along well with (and is meant to be used in conjunction with, but can be standalone without) [ComputerCraft Greg Flavoured](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/computercraft-greg-flavored).

The [Repository](https://github.com/TheDogOfChaos/Toms-Peripherals-Greg-Flavoured) and certain releases contain original/modified textures and models from:
- [CC:Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked)
- [GTCEu Modern](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtechceu-modern)
- [GregTech Refreshed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gregtech-refreshed)
- [ComputerCraft Greg Flavoured](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/computercraft-greg-flavored)
